                <span class="log-type ${type}">${type.toUpperCase()}</span>
                <span class="log-message">${message}</span>
            `;
            activityFeed.appendChild(line);

            // Keep only last 100 lines
            while (activityFeed.children.length > 100) {
                activityFeed.removeChild(activityFeed.firstChild);
            }

            // Auto-scroll to bottom
            activityFeed.scrollTop = activityFeed.scrollHeight;
        }

        async function fetchStatus() {
            try {
                const resp = await fetch('/api/status');
                const data = await resp.json();

                // Update connection badge
                const isConnected = data.scanner.ws_connected;
                document.getElementById('connection-status').innerHTML = `
                    <span class="status-badge ${isConnected ? 'live' : 'offline'}">
                        <span class="status-dot"></span>
                        ${isConnected ? 'Connected' : 'Disconnected'}
                    </span>
                `;

                // Update scanner stats (show daily values, fallback to cumulative)
                document.getElementById('stat-markets').textContent = data.scanner.markets;
                const priceUpdatesToday = data.scanner.price_updates_today ?? data.scanner.price_updates;
                const alertsToday = data.scanner.arbitrage_alerts_today ?? data.scanner.arbitrage_alerts;
                document.getElementById('stat-updates').textContent = priceUpdatesToday.toLocaleString();
                document.getElementById('stat-alerts').textContent = alertsToday;

                // Update config
                document.getElementById('config-mode').innerHTML = data.bot.dry_run
                    ? '<span class="neutral">DRY RUN</span>'
                    : '<span class="positive">LIVE</span>';
                document.getElementById('config-profit').textContent = data.bot.min_profit;
                document.getElementById('config-position').textContent = data.bot.max_position;

                // Log price updates delta (use daily value for consistency)
                const updatesDelta = priceUpdatesToday - lastPriceUpdates;
                if (lastPriceUpdates > 0 && updatesDelta > 0) {
                    addLogLine('price', `Received ${updatesDelta} price updates (${data.scanner.markets} markets)`);
                }
                lastPriceUpdates = priceUpdatesToday;

            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Status fetch error:', e);
                addLogLine('error', 'Failed to fetch status');
            }
        }

        async function fetchBalance() {
            try {
                // Fetch both balance and positions
                const [balanceResp, positionsResp] = await Promise.all([
                    fetch('/api/balance'),
                    fetch('/api/positions')
                ]);
                const data = await balanceResp.json();
                const positionsData = await positionsResp.json();

                if (data.error) {
                    document.getElementById('balance-content').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="stat-value negative">Error</div>
                        <div class="stat-label">${data.error}</div>
                    `;
                } else {
                    // Calculate open positions expected value
                    const openPositions = positionsData.open || [];
                    const openPositionsValue = openPositions.reduce((sum, p) => {
                        return sum + (p.current_value || (p.size * (p.current_price || 0)));
                    }, 0);
                    const positionsUnrealizedPnl = openPositions.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.pnl || 0), 0);

                    // Calculate pending redemption value (WON positions = $1/share, LOST = $0)
                    const closedPositions = positionsData.closed || [];
                    const pendingRedemption = closedPositions.reduce((sum, p) => {
                        // WON positions are worth $1 per share
                        if (p.status === 'WON' && p.redeemable) {
                            return sum + (p.size || 0);
                        }
                        return sum;
                    }, 0);
                    const pendingCount = closedPositions.filter(p => p.status === 'WON' && p.redeemable).length;

                    // Total = USDC + Open Positions + Pending Redemption
                    const totalValue = data.polymarket_usdc + openPositionsValue + pendingRedemption;
                    const pnlColor = positionsUnrealizedPnl >= 0 ? 'var(--accent-green)' : 'var(--accent-red)';
                    const pnlSign = positionsUnrealizedPnl >= 0 ? '+' : '';

                    document.getElementById('balance-content').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="stat-value">$${totalValue.toFixed(2)}</div>
                        <div class="stat-row">
                            <span>Polymarket (USDC)</span>
                            <span>$${data.polymarket_usdc.toFixed(2)}</span>
                        </div>
                        ${openPositions.length > 0 ? `
                        <div class="stat-row">
                            <span>Open Positions (${openPositions.length})</span>
                            <span>$${openPositionsValue.toFixed(2)}</span>
                        </div>
                        ` : ''}
                        ${pendingRedemption > 0 ? `
                        <div class="stat-row">
                            <span>Pending Redemption (${pendingCount})</span>
                            <span style="color: var(--accent-green);">$${pendingRedemption.toFixed(2)}</span>
                        </div>
                        ` : ''}
                        ${positionsUnrealizedPnl !== 0 ? `
                        <div class="stat-row">
                            <span>Unrealized P&L</span>
                            <span style="color: ${pnlColor};">${pnlSign}$${positionsUnrealizedPnl.toFixed(2)}</span>
                        </div>
                        ` : ''}
                    `;
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Balance fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        async function fetchPnL() {
            try {
                const resp = await fetch('/api/pnl');
                const data = await resp.json();
                const daily = data.daily;
                const allTime = data.all_time;
                const realized = data.realized || {};

                const realizedPnl = realized.total_pnl || 0;
                const pnlColor = realizedPnl >= 0 ? 'var(--accent-green)' : 'var(--accent-red)';
                const pnlSign = realizedPnl >= 0 ? '+' : '';

                document.getElementById('pnl-content').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="stat-value" style="color: ${pnlColor};">${pnlSign}$${realizedPnl.toFixed(2)}</div>
                    <div class="stat-label" style="margin-bottom: 12px;">Realized P&L</div>
                    <div class="stat-row">
                        <span>Winning Positions</span>
                        <span class="positive">${realized.winning_positions || 0}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="stat-row">
                        <span>Losing Positions</span>
                        <span class="negative">${realized.losing_positions || 0}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="stat-row">
                        <span>All-Time Trades</span>
                        <span>${allTime.total_trades || 0}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="stat-row">
                        <span>All-Time Volume</span>
                        <span>$${(allTime.total_volume || 0).toFixed(2)}</span>
                    </div>
                `;
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('PnL fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        let lastAlertCount = 0;
        let alertsOffset = 0;
        let alertsTotal = 0;
        let allAlerts = [];

        async function fetchAlerts(loadMore = false) {
            try {
                if (!loadMore) {
                    alertsOffset = 0;
                    allAlerts = [];
                }

                const resp = await fetch(`/api/alerts?limit=10&offset=${alertsOffset}`);
                const data = await resp.json();
                alertsTotal = data.total || 0;

                // Update count display
                document.getElementById('alerts-count').textContent = `${alertsTotal} total`;

                // Log new alerts (only on initial load)
                if (!loadMore && data.count > lastAlertCount && lastAlertCount > 0) {
                    const newAlerts = data.alerts.slice(0, data.count - lastAlertCount);
                    newAlerts.forEach(alert => {
                        addLogLine('alert', `ARBITRAGE: ${alert.market.slice(0, 40)}... +${(alert.profit * 100).toFixed(2)}%`);
                    });
                }
                lastAlertCount = data.count;

                // Append or replace alerts
                if (loadMore) {
                    allAlerts = [...allAlerts, ...data.alerts];
                } else {
                    allAlerts = data.alerts;
                }
                alertsOffset += data.count;

                // Show/hide load more button
                const pagination = document.getElementById('alerts-pagination');
                if (data.has_more) {
                    pagination.style.display = 'block';
                } else {
                    pagination.style.display = 'none';
                }

                if (allAlerts.length === 0) {
                    document.getElementById('alerts-container').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="empty-state">Monitoring for opportunities...</div>
                    `;
                } else {
                    document.getElementById('alerts-container').innerHTML = allAlerts.map(alert => {
                        const platform = (alert.platform || 'polymarket').toUpperCase();

                        // Format resolution date in PST
                        let resolveStr = '?';
                        if (alert.resolution_date) {
                            const date = new Date(alert.resolution_date);
                            resolveStr = date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
                                weekday: 'long',
                                year: 'numeric',
                                month: 'long',
                                day: 'numeric',
                                timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles'
                            }) + ' @ ' + date.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
                                hour: 'numeric',
                                minute: '2-digit',
                                hour12: true,
                                timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles'
                            }) + ' PST';
                        } else if (alert.days_until_resolution !== null && alert.days_until_resolution !== undefined) {
                            resolveStr = `${alert.days_until_resolution} days`;
                        }

                        // Format alert timestamp in PST (assume UTC if no timezone)
                        let alertTime = '';
                        if (alert.timestamp) {
                            const tsStr = alert.timestamp.endsWith('Z') || alert.timestamp.includes('+') ? alert.timestamp : alert.timestamp + 'Z';
                            const ts = new Date(tsStr);
                            alertTime = ts.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
                                hour: 'numeric',
                                minute: '2-digit',
                                hour12: true,
                                timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles'
                            }) + ' PST';
                        }

                        return `
                        <div class="alert-item">
                            <div class="alert-market">
                                <span style="color: ${platform === 'KALSHI' ? '#ff9800' : '#4caf50'}; font-weight: bold; margin-right: 6px;">[${platform}]</span>
                                ${alert.market || 'Unknown Market'}
                            </div>
                            <div class="alert-details">
                                YES: $${(alert.yes_ask || 0).toFixed(4)} +
                                NO: $${(alert.no_ask || 0).toFixed(4)} =
                                $${(alert.combined || 0).toFixed(4)}
                                <span class="alert-profit">+${((alert.profit || 0) * 100).toFixed(2)}%</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="alert-details" style="margin-top: 4px;">
                                <span style="color: #888;">Resolves: ${resolveStr}</span>
                                <span style="margin-left: 12px; color: #666;">Spotted: ${alertTime}</span>
                                ${alert.duration_secs !== null && alert.duration_secs !== undefined && alert.duration_secs > 0
                                    ? `<span style="margin-left: 12px; color: var(--accent-yellow);">Lasted: ${alert.duration_secs < 1 ? Math.round(alert.duration_secs * 1000) + 'ms' : alert.duration_secs.toFixed(1) + 's'}</span>`
                                    : `<span style="margin-left: 12px; color: #666;">Lasted: pending</span>`}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `}).join('');
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Alerts fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        // Near-miss (illiquid) alerts
        let nearMissOffset = 0;
        let nearMissTotal = 0;
        let allNearMissAlerts = [];

        async function fetchNearMissAlerts(loadMore = false) {
            try {
                if (!loadMore) {
                    nearMissOffset = 0;
                    allNearMissAlerts = [];
                }

                const resp = await fetch(`/api/near-miss-alerts?limit=10&offset=${nearMissOffset}`);
                const data = await resp.json();
                nearMissTotal = data.total || 0;

                // Update count display
                document.getElementById('near-miss-count').textContent = `${nearMissTotal} total`;

                // Append or replace alerts
                if (loadMore) {
                    allNearMissAlerts = [...allNearMissAlerts, ...data.alerts];
                } else {
                    allNearMissAlerts = data.alerts;
                }
                nearMissOffset += data.count;

                // Show/hide load more button
                const pagination = document.getElementById('near-miss-pagination');
                if (data.has_more) {
                    pagination.style.display = 'block';
                } else {
                    pagination.style.display = 'none';
                }

                if (allNearMissAlerts.length === 0) {
                    document.getElementById('near-miss-container').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="empty-state">No illiquid opportunities detected yet</div>
                    `;
                } else {
                    document.getElementById('near-miss-container').innerHTML = allNearMissAlerts.map(alert => {
                        // Format timestamp in PST
                        let alertTime = '';
                        if (alert.timestamp) {
                            const tsStr = alert.timestamp.endsWith('Z') || alert.timestamp.includes('+') ? alert.timestamp : alert.timestamp + 'Z';
                            const ts = new Date(tsStr);
                            alertTime = ts.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
                                hour: 'numeric',
                                minute: '2-digit',
                                hour12: true,
                                timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles'
                            }) + ' PST';
                        }

                        // Calculate dollar liquidity (shares × price)
                        const yesShares = alert.yes_liquidity || 0;
                        const noShares = alert.no_liquidity || 0;
                        const yesDollarLiq = yesShares * (alert.yes_ask || 0);
                        const noDollarLiq = noShares * (alert.no_ask || 0);
                        const minDollarLiq = Math.min(yesDollarLiq, noDollarLiq);
                        const minSharesRequired = alert.min_required || 10;
                        // Min required in dollars uses the cheaper side (NO) price
                        const minDollarRequired = minSharesRequired * Math.min(alert.yes_ask || 1, alert.no_ask || 1);
                        // Determine which side is the bottleneck
                        const yesIsBottleneck = yesDollarLiq <= noDollarLiq;
                        const yesColor = yesIsBottleneck ? 'var(--accent-red)' : '#888';
                        const noColor = !yesIsBottleneck ? 'var(--accent-red)' : '#888';
                        const bottleneckSide = yesIsBottleneck ? 'YES' : 'NO';

                        return `
                        <div class="alert-item" style="border-left: 3px solid var(--accent-yellow);">
                            <div class="alert-market">
                                <span style="color: var(--accent-yellow); font-weight: bold; margin-right: 6px;">⚠️</span>
                                ${alert.market || 'Unknown Market'}
                            </div>
                            <div class="alert-details">
                                YES: $${(alert.yes_ask || 0).toFixed(4)} +
                                NO: $${(alert.no_ask || 0).toFixed(4)} =
                                $${(alert.combined || 0).toFixed(4)}
                                <span class="alert-profit">+${((alert.profit_pct || 0) * 100).toFixed(2)}%</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="alert-details" style="margin-top: 4px;">
                                <span style="color: var(--accent-red);">Liquidity: $${minDollarLiq.toFixed(2)} (need $${minDollarRequired.toFixed(2)}) - <b>${bottleneckSide} side</b></span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="alert-details" style="margin-top: 2px;">
                                <span style="color: ${yesColor}; ${yesIsBottleneck ? 'font-weight: bold;' : ''}">YES: $${yesDollarLiq.toFixed(2)} (${yesShares.toFixed(0)} sh)</span>
                                <span style="margin: 0 8px; color: #666;">|</span>
                                <span style="color: ${noColor}; ${!yesIsBottleneck ? 'font-weight: bold;' : ''}">NO: $${noDollarLiq.toFixed(2)} (${noShares.toFixed(0)} sh)</span>
                                <span style="margin-left: 12px; color: #666;">Spotted: ${alertTime}</span>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `}).join('');
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Near-miss alerts fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        let lastTradeCount = 0;
        let tradesOffset = 0;
        let tradesTotal = 0;
        let allTrades = [];

        async function fetchTrades(loadMore = false) {
            try {
                if (!loadMore) {
                    tradesOffset = 0;
                    allTrades = [];
                }

                const resp = await fetch(`/api/trades?limit=10&offset=${tradesOffset}`);
                const data = await resp.json();
                tradesTotal = data.total || 0;

                // Update count display
                document.getElementById('trades-count').textContent = `${tradesTotal} total`;

                // Log new trades (only on initial load)
                if (!loadMore && data.count > lastTradeCount && lastTradeCount > 0) {
                    addLogLine('trade', `New trade executed!`);
                }
                lastTradeCount = data.count;

                // Append or replace trades
                if (loadMore) {
                    allTrades = [...allTrades, ...data.trades];
                } else {
                    allTrades = data.trades;
                }
                tradesOffset += data.count;

                // Show/hide load more button
                const pagination = document.getElementById('trades-pagination');
                if (data.has_more) {
                    pagination.style.display = 'block';
                } else {
                    pagination.style.display = 'none';
                }

                if (allTrades.length === 0) {
                    document.getElementById('trades-container').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="empty-state">No trades yet</div>
                    `;
                } else {
                    document.getElementById('trades-container').innerHTML = `
                        <table>
                            <thead>
                                <tr>
                                    <th>Time</th>
                                    <th>Market</th>
                                    <th>Side</th>
                                    <th>Outcome</th>
                                    <th>Qty</th>
                                    <th>Price</th>
                                    <th>Cost</th>
                                </tr>
                            </thead>
                            <tbody>
                                ${allTrades.map(t => `
                                    <tr>
                                        <td>${formatDateTime(t.timestamp)}</td>
                                        <td>${t.market}</td>
                                        <td>${t.side}</td>
                                        <td><span style="color: ${t.outcome === 'yes' ? 'var(--accent-green)' : 'var(--accent-red)'}; font-weight: 600;">${(t.outcome || '').toUpperCase()}</span></td>
                                        <td>${t.size}</td>
                                        <td>$${t.price.toFixed(3)}</td>
                                        <td>$${t.cost.toFixed(2)}</td>
                                    </tr>
                                `).join('')}
                            </tbody>
                        </table>
                    `;
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Trades fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        function renderPositionsTable(positions, containerId, emptyMessage) {
            if (!positions || positions.length === 0) {
                document.getElementById(containerId).innerHTML = `
                    <div class="empty-state">${emptyMessage}</div>
                `;
            } else {
                document.getElementById(containerId).innerHTML = `
                    <table>
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Market</th>
                                <th>Outcome</th>
                                <th>Status</th>
                                <th>Size</th>
                                <th>Avg Price</th>
                                <th>Current</th>
                                <th>P&L</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            ${positions.map(p => {
                                const pnlColor = p.pnl >= 0 ? 'var(--accent-green)' : 'var(--accent-red)';
                                const statusColor = p.status === 'WON' ? 'var(--accent-green)'
                                    : p.status === 'LOST' ? 'var(--accent-red)'
                                    : p.status === 'OPEN' ? 'var(--accent-blue)'
                                    : 'var(--accent-yellow)';
                                const costBasis = p.initial_value || (p.size * p.avg_price);
                                return `
                                <tr>
                                    <td>${p.market || p.token_id?.substring(0, 20) || 'Unknown'}</td>
                                    <td><span style="color: ${p.outcome === 'Yes' ? 'var(--accent-green)' : 'var(--accent-red)'}; font-weight: 600;">${p.outcome || '-'}</span></td>
                                    <td><span style="color: ${statusColor}; font-weight: 600;">${p.status}${p.redeemable ? ' 💰' : ''}</span></td>
                                    <td>${p.size} <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">($${costBasis?.toFixed(2)})</span></td>
                                    <td>$${p.avg_price?.toFixed(3) || '-'}</td>
                                    <td>$${p.current_price?.toFixed(3) || '-'}</td>
                                    <td style="color: ${pnlColor}; font-weight: 600;">$${p.pnl?.toFixed(2) || '0.00'}</td>
                                </tr>
                            `}).join('')}
                        </tbody>
                    </table>
                `;
            }
        }

        async function fetchPositions() {
            try {
                const resp = await fetch('/api/positions');
                const data = await resp.json();

                if (data.error) {
                    document.getElementById('open-positions-container').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="empty-state">${data.error}</div>
                    `;
                    document.getElementById('closed-positions-container').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="empty-state">${data.error}</div>
                    `;
                    return;
                }

                renderPositionsTable(data.open, 'open-positions-container', 'No open positions');
                renderPositionsTable(data.closed, 'closed-positions-container', 'No closed positions');
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Positions fetch error:', e);
                document.getElementById('open-positions-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="empty-state">Failed to load positions</div>
                `;
                document.getElementById('closed-positions-container').innerHTML = `
                    <div class="empty-state">Failed to load positions</div>
                `;
            }
        }

        // Orders/executions state for lazy loading
        let executionsOffset = 0;
        let allExecutions = [];
        let executionsHasMore = true;
        let executionsLoading = false;
        let lastStats = {};
        let userLoadedMore = false;  // Track if user has loaded more data

        async function fetchOrders(loadMore = false) {
            if (executionsLoading) return;
            executionsLoading = true;

            try {
                // If user has loaded more data and this is an auto-refresh, skip resetting
                // This preserves their scroll position and loaded data
                if (!loadMore && userLoadedMore) {
                    // Just update stats, don't reset data
                    const resp = await fetch('/api/orders?limit=1&offset=0');
                    const data = await resp.json();
                    lastStats = data.stats || {};
                    // Update stats display without resetting table
                    const statsContainer = document.querySelector('#orders-container > div:first-child');
                    if (statsContainer) {
                        statsContainer.innerHTML = `
                            <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                                <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Total:</span>
                                <span style="font-weight: 600;">${lastStats.total_attempts || 0}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                                <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Filled:</span>
                                <span style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent-green);">${lastStats.successful || 0}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                                <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Partial:</span>
                                <span style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent-yellow);">${lastStats.partial || 0}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                                <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Cancelled:</span>
                                <span style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent-blue);">${lastStats.cancelled || 0}</span>
                            </div>
                            <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                                <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Failed:</span>
                                <span style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent-red);">${lastStats.failed || 0}</span>
                            </div>
                        `;
                    }
                    executionsLoading = false;
                    return;
                }

                if (!loadMore) {
                    executionsOffset = 0;
                    allExecutions = [];
                    executionsHasMore = true;
                } else {
                    userLoadedMore = true;  // User explicitly loaded more
                }

                const resp = await fetch(`/api/orders?limit=50&offset=${executionsOffset}`);
                const data = await resp.json();

                const container = document.getElementById('orders-container');
                const activeOrders = data.active_orders || [];
                const newExecs = data.recent_executions || [];
                const stats = data.stats || {};

                // Append new executions
                if (loadMore) {
                    allExecutions = [...allExecutions, ...newExecs];
                } else {
                    allExecutions = newExecs;
                }
                executionsOffset += newExecs.length;
                executionsHasMore = newExecs.length === 50;  // If we got a full page, there might be more
                lastStats = stats;

                const recentExecs = allExecutions;

                let html = '';

                // Stats summary
                html += `
                    <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;">
                        <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                            <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Total:</span>
                            <span style="font-weight: 600;">${stats.total_attempts || 0}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                            <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Filled:</span>
                            <span style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent-green);">${stats.successful || 0}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                            <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Partial:</span>
                            <span style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent-yellow);">${stats.partial || 0}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                            <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Cancelled:</span>
                            <span style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent-blue);">${stats.cancelled || 0}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="padding: 8px 16px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border-radius: 6px;">
                            <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Failed:</span>
                            <span style="font-weight: 600; color: var(--accent-red);">${stats.failed || 0}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;

                // Active orders (in progress)
                if (activeOrders.length > 0) {
                    html += `<h4 style="margin: 16px 0 8px; color: var(--accent-yellow);">Active Orders (Pending Fill)</h4>`;
                    html += `<div class="table-container"><table>
                        <thead>
                            <tr>
                                <th>Market</th>
                                <th>Outcome</th>
                                <th>Price</th>
                                <th>Size</th>
                                <th>Status</th>
                                <th>Time</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            ${activeOrders.map(o => `
                                <tr>
                                    <td>${o.market}</td>
                                    <td><span style="color: ${o.outcome === 'YES' ? 'var(--accent-green)' : 'var(--accent-red)'}; font-weight: 600;">${o.outcome}</span></td>
                                    <td>$${o.price.toFixed(3)}</td>
                                    <td>${o.size}</td>
                                    <td><span style="color: var(--accent-yellow);">${o.status}</span></td>
                                    <td>${formatDateTime(o.created_at)}</td>
                                </tr>
                            `).join('')}
                        </tbody>
                    </table></div>`;
                }

                // Recent executions (sorted by time descending - most recent first)
                if (recentExecs.length > 0) {
                    html += `<h4 style="margin: 16px 0 8px; color: var(--text-secondary);">Recent Executions</h4>`;
                    html += `<div id="executions-table-container" class="table-container" style="max-height: 600px; overflow-y: auto;"><table>
                        <thead style="position: sticky; top: 0; background: var(--bg-secondary); z-index: 1;">
                            <tr>
                                <th>Time</th>
                                <th>Market</th>
                                <th>Arb %</th>
                                <th>YES Liq</th>
                                <th>NO Liq</th>
                                <th>YES Order</th>
                                <th>NO Order</th>
                                <th>Status</th>
                                <th>Latency</th>
                                <th>Cost</th>
                            </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            ${recentExecs.map((e, idx) => {
                                // Determine display status with more detail
                                let displayStatus = e.status.toUpperCase();
                                let statusColor = 'var(--accent-red)';

                                // Check if both sides failed due to FOK liquidity constraints
                                const yesHasFokError = e.yes_order.error && (e.yes_order.error.includes('FOK') || e.yes_order.error.includes('fully filled'));
                                const noHasFokError = e.no_order.error && (e.no_order.error.includes('FOK') || e.no_order.error.includes('fully filled'));
                                const bothFokFailed = yesHasFokError && noHasFokError;

                                if (e.status === 'filled') {
                                    statusColor = 'var(--accent-green)';
                                } else if (e.status === 'cancelled') {
                                    statusColor = 'var(--accent-blue)';
                                } else if (bothFokFailed) {
                                    // Both sides failed due to insufficient liquidity (FOK orders couldn't fill)
                                    displayStatus = 'ILLIQUID';
                                    statusColor = 'var(--accent-orange, #f59e0b)';
                                } else if (e.status === 'partial') {
                                    statusColor = 'var(--accent-yellow)';
                                    // More descriptive partial statuses
                                    if (e.yes_order.status === 'submitted' && e.no_order.status === 'submitted') {
                                        displayStatus = 'TIMEOUT';
                                        statusColor = 'var(--accent-blue)';
                                    } else if (e.yes_order.status === 'filled' && e.no_order.status !== 'filled') {
                                        displayStatus = 'YES ONLY';
                                    } else if (e.no_order.status === 'filled' && e.yes_order.status !== 'filled') {
                                        displayStatus = 'NO ONLY';
                                    }
                                }

                                // Format arb profit %
                                const arbPct = e.profit_pct ? `+${(e.profit_pct * 100).toFixed(2)}%` : '-';
                                // Calculate dollar liquidity (shares × price)
                                const yesSharesExec = e.yes_liquidity || 0;
                                const noSharesExec = e.no_liquidity || 0;
                                const yesPriceExec = e.yes_order?.price || 0;
                                const noPriceExec = e.no_order?.price || 0;
                                const yesDollarLiqExec = yesSharesExec * yesPriceExec;
                                const noDollarLiqExec = noSharesExec * noPriceExec;
                                // Format with both dollar value and shares
                                const yesLiq = yesSharesExec > 0 ? `$${yesDollarLiqExec.toFixed(0)} (${yesSharesExec.toFixed(0)}sh)` : (e.market_liquidity ? `$${(e.market_liquidity/2).toLocaleString(undefined, {maximumFractionDigits: 0})}` : '-');
                                const noLiq = noSharesExec > 0 ? `$${noDollarLiqExec.toFixed(0)} (${noSharesExec.toFixed(0)}sh)` : (e.market_liquidity ? `$${(e.market_liquidity/2).toLocaleString(undefined, {maximumFractionDigits: 0})}` : '-');

                                // Format timing info
                                const timing = e.timing;
                                let latencyDisplay = '-';
                                let timingDetails = '';
                                const isExpanded = expandedTimingRows.has(idx);
                                if (timing && timing.deltas) {
                                    const totalMs = timing.deltas.total_execute_ms || timing.deltas.total_latency_ms;
                                    if (totalMs) {
                                        latencyDisplay = `${Math.round(totalMs)}ms`;
                                    }
                                    // Build timing breakdown for expandable row
                                    const deltas = timing.deltas;
                                    timingDetails = `
                                        <tr class="timing-details" id="timing-${idx}" style="display: ${isExpanded ? 'table-row' : 'none'}; background: var(--bg-tertiary);">
                                            <td colspan="10" style="padding: 8px 16px;">
                                                <div style="display: flex; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; font-size: 11px;">
                                                    ${deltas.warmup_ms !== undefined ? `<span>🔥 Warmup: <b>${deltas.warmup_ms}ms</b></span>` : ''}
                                                    ${deltas.prefetch_ms !== undefined ? `<span>🔍 Prefetch: <b>${deltas.prefetch_ms}ms</b></span>` : ''}
                                                    ${deltas.sign_ms !== undefined ? `<span>✍️ Sign: <b>${deltas.sign_ms}ms</b></span>` : ''}
                                                    ${deltas.submit_ms !== undefined ? `<span>📤 Submit: <b>${deltas.submit_ms}ms</b>${deltas.yes_submit_ms !== undefined && deltas.no_submit_ms !== undefined ? ` (Y:${deltas.yes_submit_ms}/N:${deltas.no_submit_ms})` : ''}</span>` : ''}
                                                    ${deltas.total_execute_ms !== undefined ? `<span>⚡ Total: <b>${Math.round(deltas.total_execute_ms)}ms</b></span>` : ''}
                                                </div>
                                            </td>
                                        </tr>`;
                                }

                                const yesError = e.yes_order.error ? `<div style="color: var(--accent-red); font-size: 10px; max-width: 200px; word-wrap: break-word;">${e.yes_order.error}</div>` : '';
                                const noError = e.no_order.error ? `<div style="color: var(--accent-red); font-size: 10px; max-width: 200px; word-wrap: break-word;">${e.no_order.error}</div>` : '';
                                return `
                                <tr style="cursor: ${timing ? 'pointer' : 'default'};" onclick="${timing ? `toggleTimingRow(${idx})` : ''}">
                                    <td>${formatDateTime(e.timestamp)}</td>
                                    <td>${e.market}</td>
                                    <td style="color: var(--accent-green); font-weight: 600;">${arbPct}</td>
                                    <td style="color: var(--accent-green);">${yesLiq}</td>
                                    <td style="color: var(--accent-red);">${noLiq}</td>
                                    <td>
                                        <span style="color: ${e.yes_order.status === 'filled' ? 'var(--accent-green)' : e.yes_order.status === 'submitted' ? 'var(--accent-blue)' : 'var(--accent-red)'};">
                                            ${e.yes_order.status}
                                        </span>
                                        <span style="color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 11px;"> ${e.yes_order.filled_size || e.yes_order.size}@$${e.yes_order.price.toFixed(3)}</span>
                                        ${yesError}
                                    </td>
                                    <td>
                                        <span style="color: ${e.no_order.status === 'filled' ? 'var(--accent-green)' : e.no_order.status === 'submitted' ? 'var(--accent-blue)' : 'var(--accent-red)'};">
                                            ${e.no_order.status}
                                        </span>
                                        <span style="color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 11px;"> ${e.no_order.filled_size || e.no_order.size}@$${e.no_order.price.toFixed(3)}</span>
                                        ${noError}
                                    </td>
                                    <td><span style="color: ${statusColor}; font-weight: 600;">${displayStatus}</span></td>
                                    <td style="color: var(--accent-blue); font-weight: 500;">${latencyDisplay}${timing ? (isExpanded ? ' ▲' : ' ▼') : ''}</td>
                                    <td>$${e.total_cost.toFixed(2)}</td>
                                </tr>
                                ${timingDetails}
                            `}).join('')}
                        </tbody>
                    </table></div>`;

                    // Add Load More button if there might be more data
                    if (executionsHasMore) {
                        html += `<div id="executions-pagination" style="text-align: center; padding: 12px;">
                            <button onclick="fetchOrders(true)" style="padding: 8px 24px; background: var(--bg-tertiary); border: 1px solid var(--border-color); border-radius: 6px; color: var(--text-primary); cursor: pointer;">
                                Load More (${allExecutions.length} loaded)
                            </button>
                        </div>`;
                    }
                }

                if (activeOrders.length === 0 && recentExecs.length === 0) {
                    html = '<div class="empty-state">No orders yet</div>';
                }

                // Preserve scroll position of the executions table before updating
                const oldExecTable = document.getElementById('executions-table-container');
                let scrollTop = oldExecTable ? oldExecTable.scrollTop : 0;

                container.innerHTML = html;

                // Restore scroll position and add scroll listener for infinite scroll
                const execTableContainer = document.getElementById('executions-table-container');
                if (execTableContainer) {
                    // Restore scroll position
                    if (scrollTop > 0) {
                        execTableContainer.scrollTop = scrollTop;
                    }

                    // Add scroll listener for infinite scroll
                    execTableContainer.onscroll = function() {
                        // Load more when scrolled near bottom (within 100px)
                        const nearBottom = execTableContainer.scrollTop + execTableContainer.clientHeight >= execTableContainer.scrollHeight - 100;
                        if (executionsHasMore && !executionsLoading && nearBottom) {
                            fetchOrders(true);
                        }
                    };
                }

                // Log active orders
                if (activeOrders.length > 0) {
                    addLogLine('info', `${activeOrders.length} order(s) pending fill...`);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Orders fetch error:', e);
            } finally {
                executionsLoading = false;
            }
        }

        // Redeemed positions history (from database)
        let redeemedHistoryOffset = 0;
        let allRedeemedHistory = [];

        async function fetchRedeemedHistory(loadMore = false) {
            try {
                if (!loadMore) {
                    redeemedHistoryOffset = 0;
                    allRedeemedHistory = [];
                }

                const resp = await fetch(`/api/closed-positions?limit=20&offset=${redeemedHistoryOffset}`);
                const data = await resp.json();

                document.getElementById('redeemed-history-count').textContent = `${data.total || 0} closed`;

                if (loadMore) {
                    allRedeemedHistory = [...allRedeemedHistory, ...data.positions];
                } else {
                    allRedeemedHistory = data.positions;
                }
                redeemedHistoryOffset += data.count;

                const pagination = document.getElementById('redeemed-history-pagination');
                pagination.style.display = data.has_more ? 'block' : 'none';

                if (allRedeemedHistory.length === 0) {
                    document.getElementById('redeemed-history-container').innerHTML = `
                        <div class="empty-state">No closed positions yet</div>
                    `;
                } else {
                    document.getElementById('redeemed-history-container').innerHTML = renderClosedPositionsTable(allRedeemedHistory);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Redeemed history fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        function renderClosedPositionsTable(positions) {
            // Group positions by market and approximate timestamp (within 1 hour)
            const groups = {};
            positions.forEach(p => {
                // Create group key from market + date (hour precision for grouping trades)
                const date = new Date(p.timestamp);
                const hourKey = `${date.toISOString().slice(0, 13)}`; // YYYY-MM-DDTHH
                const groupKey = `${p.market}|${hourKey}`;

                if (!groups[groupKey]) {
                    groups[groupKey] = {
                        market: p.market,
                        timestamp: p.timestamp,
                        positions: [],
                        statuses: new Set(),
                        totalCost: 0,
                        totalValue: 0,
                        totalPnl: 0
                    };
                }
                groups[groupKey].positions.push(p);
                groups[groupKey].statuses.add(p.status || 'CLOSED');
                groups[groupKey].totalCost += p.cost_basis;
                groups[groupKey].totalValue += p.realized_value;
                groups[groupKey].totalPnl += p.realized_pnl;
                // Use earliest timestamp for the group
                if (new Date(p.timestamp) < new Date(groups[groupKey].timestamp)) {
                    groups[groupKey].timestamp = p.timestamp;
                }
            });

            // Sort groups by timestamp descending
            const sortedGroups = Object.values(groups).sort((a, b) =>
                new Date(b.timestamp) - new Date(a.timestamp)
            );

            // Render grouped table
            let html = `<table>
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th style="width: 30px;"></th>
                        <th>Date</th>
                        <th>Market</th>
                        <th>Sides</th>
                        <th>Status</th>
                        <th>Total Cost</th>
                        <th>Total Value</th>
                        <th>Net P&L</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>`;

            sortedGroups.forEach((group, idx) => {
                const pnlColor = group.totalPnl >= 0 ? 'var(--accent-green)' : 'var(--accent-red)';
                const pnlSign = group.totalPnl >= 0 ? '+' : '';
                const hasMultiple = group.positions.length > 1;
                const sidesLabel = group.positions.map(p => p.outcome).join(' + ');
                const groupId = `group-${idx}`;

                // Format status with color
                const statusList = Array.from(group.statuses);
                const statusLabel = statusList.join(', ');
                const statusColor = statusList.includes('SOLD') ? 'var(--accent-yellow)' :
                                   statusList.some(s => s === 'WON' || s === 'REDEEMED') ? 'var(--accent-green)' :
                                   statusList.includes('LOST') ? 'var(--accent-red)' : 'var(--text-secondary)';

                // Summary row
                html += `
                    <tr class="group-header" style="cursor: ${hasMultiple ? 'pointer' : 'default'};" onclick="${hasMultiple ? `toggleGroup('${groupId}')` : ''}">
                        <td style="text-align: center; color: var(--text-secondary);">
                            ${hasMultiple ? `<span id="${groupId}-icon">▶</span>` : ''}
                        </td>
                        <td>${formatDateTime(group.timestamp)}</td>
                        <td title="${group.market}">${(group.market || '-').slice(0, 40)}${(group.market || '').length > 40 ? '...' : ''}</td>
                        <td>${sidesLabel}</td>
                        <td style="color: ${statusColor};">${statusLabel}</td>
                        <td>$${group.totalCost.toFixed(2)}</td>
                        <td>$${group.totalValue.toFixed(2)}</td>
                        <td style="color: ${pnlColor}; font-weight: 600;">${pnlSign}$${group.totalPnl.toFixed(2)}</td>
                    </tr>`;

                // Detail rows (hidden by default)
                if (hasMultiple) {
                    group.positions.forEach(p => {
                        const itemPnlColor = p.realized_pnl >= 0 ? 'var(--accent-green)' : 'var(--accent-red)';
                        const itemPnlSign = p.realized_pnl >= 0 ? '+' : '';
                        const itemStatus = p.status || 'CLOSED';
                        const itemStatusColor = itemStatus === 'SOLD' ? 'var(--accent-yellow)' :
                                               itemStatus === 'WON' || itemStatus === 'REDEEMED' ? 'var(--accent-green)' :
                                               itemStatus === 'LOST' ? 'var(--accent-red)' : 'var(--text-secondary)';

                        html += `
                        <tr class="${groupId}-detail" style="display: none; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);">
                            <td></td>
                            <td style="padding-left: 20px; color: var(--text-secondary);">└</td>
                            <td>
                                <span style="color: ${p.outcome === 'Yes' ? 'var(--accent-green)' : 'var(--accent-red)'}; font-weight: 600;">
                                    ${p.outcome}
                                </span>
                                <span style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-left: 8px;">${p.size.toFixed(0)} @ $${p.avg_price.toFixed(3)}</span>
                            </td>
                            <td style="color: ${itemStatusColor};">${itemStatus}</td>
                            <td>$${p.cost_basis.toFixed(2)}</td>
                            <td>$${p.realized_value.toFixed(2)}</td>
                            <td style="color: ${itemPnlColor};">${itemPnlSign}$${p.realized_pnl.toFixed(2)}</td>
                        </tr>`;
                    });
                }
            });

            html += `</tbody></table>`;
            return html;
        }

        function toggleGroup(groupId) {
            const details = document.querySelectorAll(`.${groupId}-detail`);
            const icon = document.getElementById(`${groupId}-icon`);
            const isHidden = details[0]?.style.display === 'none';

            details.forEach(row => {
                row.style.display = isHidden ? 'table-row' : 'none';
            });
            if (icon) {
                icon.textContent = isHidden ? '▼' : '▶';
            }
        }

        function toggleTimingRow(idx) {
            const row = document.getElementById(`timing-${idx}`);
            if (row) {
                const isHidden = row.style.display === 'none';
                row.style.display = isHidden ? 'table-row' : 'none';
                // Track state for re-renders
                if (isHidden) {
                    expandedTimingRows.add(idx);
                } else {
                    expandedTimingRows.delete(idx);
                }
            }
        }

        // Event listeners for load more buttons
        document.getElementById('alerts-load-more').addEventListener('click', () => fetchAlerts(true));
        document.getElementById('trades-load-more').addEventListener('click', () => fetchTrades(true));
        document.getElementById('redeemed-history-load-more').addEventListener('click', () => fetchRedeemedHistory(true));
        document.getElementById('near-miss-load-more').addEventListener('click', () => fetchNearMissAlerts(true));

        // Chart instances
        let priceUpdatesChart = null;
        let marketsChart = null;
        let alertsChart = null;
        let nearMissChart = null;
        let dailyChart = null;
        let balanceChart = null;

        // Chart.js default configuration for dark theme
        Chart.defaults.color = '#8b949e';
        Chart.defaults.borderColor = '#30363d';

        // Helper to format hour labels in PST
        function formatHourLabel(h) {
            const isoString = h.replace(' ', 'T') + ':00Z';
            const date = new Date(isoString);
            if (isNaN(date.getTime())) {
                const parts = h.split(' ');
                return parts[1] || h;
            }
            return date.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
                hour: 'numeric',
                hour12: true,
                timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles'
            });
        }

        // Helper to format minute labels in PST
        function formatMinuteLabel(m) {
            // m is "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM"
            const isoString = m.replace(' ', 'T') + ':00Z';
            const date = new Date(isoString);
            if (isNaN(date.getTime())) {
                const parts = m.split(' ');
                return parts[1] || m;
            }
            return date.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
                hour: 'numeric',
                minute: '2-digit',
                hour12: true,
                timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles'
            });
        }

        async function fetchPriceUpdatesChart() {
            try {
                const resp = await fetch('/api/charts/price-updates-minute?minutes=60');
                const data = await resp.json();

                const priceCanvas = document.getElementById('price-updates-chart');
                const priceEmpty = document.getElementById('price-updates-chart-empty');

                if (data.count === 0) {
                    priceCanvas.style.display = 'none';
                    priceEmpty.style.display = 'flex';
                    return;
                }

                priceCanvas.style.display = 'block';
                priceEmpty.style.display = 'none';

                // Only show every 5th label to avoid crowding
                const labels = data.minutes.map((m, i) => {
                    if (i % 10 === 0 || i === data.minutes.length - 1) {
                        return formatMinuteLabel(m);
                    }
                    return '';
                });

                const priceData = {
                    labels: labels,
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Price Updates/min',
                        data: data.price_updates,
                        borderColor: '#58a6ff',
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.2)',
                        fill: true,
                        tension: 0.3,
                        pointRadius: 1,
                    }]
                };

                const priceConfig = {
                    type: 'line',
                    data: priceData,
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: false,
                        plugins: {
                            legend: { display: false },
                            tooltip: {
                                backgroundColor: '#21262d',
                                borderColor: '#30363d',
                                borderWidth: 1,
                                callbacks: {
                                    title: (items) => {
                                        const idx = items[0].dataIndex;
                                        return formatMinuteLabel(data.minutes[idx]);
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        },
                        scales: {
                            x: { grid: { display: false } },
                            y: {
                                beginAtZero: true,
                                grid: { color: 'rgba(48, 54, 61, 0.5)' },
                                ticks: {
                                    callback: (v) => v >= 1000 ? (v/1000).toFixed(0) + 'k' : v
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                };

                if (priceUpdatesChart) {
                    priceUpdatesChart.data = priceData;
                    priceUpdatesChart.update('none');
                } else {
                    priceUpdatesChart = new Chart(priceCanvas, priceConfig);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Price updates chart fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        async function fetchMarketsChart() {
            try {
                const resp = await fetch('/api/charts/hourly?hours=24');
                const data = await resp.json();

                const marketsCanvas = document.getElementById('markets-chart');
                const marketsEmpty = document.getElementById('markets-chart-empty');

                if (data.count === 0) {
                    marketsCanvas.style.display = 'none';
                    marketsEmpty.style.display = 'flex';
                    return;
                }

                marketsCanvas.style.display = 'block';
                marketsEmpty.style.display = 'none';

                const labels = data.hours.map(formatHourLabel);

                const marketsData = {
                    labels: labels,
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Markets',
                        data: data.markets,
                        borderColor: '#3fb950',
                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(63, 185, 80, 0.2)',
                        fill: true,
                        tension: 0.3,
                        pointRadius: 2,
                    }]
                };

                const marketsConfig = {
                    type: 'line',
                    data: marketsData,
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: false,
                        plugins: {
                            legend: { display: false },
                            tooltip: {
                                backgroundColor: '#21262d',
                                borderColor: '#30363d',
                                borderWidth: 1,
                            }
                        },
                        scales: {
                            x: { grid: { display: false } },
                            y: {
                                grid: { color: 'rgba(48, 54, 61, 0.5)' },
                            }
                        }
                    }
                };

                if (marketsChart) {
                    marketsChart.data = marketsData;
                    marketsChart.update('none');
                } else {
                    marketsChart = new Chart(marketsCanvas, marketsConfig);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Markets chart fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        async function fetchAlertsChart() {
            try {
                const resp = await fetch('/api/charts/daily-alerts?days=7');
                const data = await resp.json();

                const canvas = document.getElementById('alerts-chart');
                const emptyMsg = document.getElementById('alerts-chart-empty');

                if (data.count === 0) {
                    canvas.style.display = 'none';
                    emptyMsg.style.display = 'flex';
                    return;
                }

                canvas.style.display = 'block';
                emptyMsg.style.display = 'none';

                // Format dates for display (MM/DD)
                const labels = data.dates.map(d => {
                    const parts = d.split('-');
                    return `${parts[1]}/${parts[2]}`;
                });

                const chartData = {
                    labels: labels,
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Alerts',
                        data: data.counts,
                        backgroundColor: '#3fb950',
                        borderRadius: 4,
                    }]
                };

                const config = {
                    type: 'bar',
                    data: chartData,
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: false,
                        plugins: {
                            legend: { display: false },
                            tooltip: {
                                backgroundColor: '#21262d',
                                borderColor: '#30363d',
                                borderWidth: 1,
                            }
                        },
                        scales: {
                            x: { grid: { display: false } },
                            y: {
                                beginAtZero: true,
                                grid: { color: 'rgba(48, 54, 61, 0.5)' },
                                ticks: { stepSize: 1 }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                };

                if (alertsChart) {
                    alertsChart.data = chartData;
                    alertsChart.update('none');
                } else {
                    alertsChart = new Chart(canvas, config);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Alerts chart fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        async function fetchNearMissChart() {
            try {
                const resp = await fetch('/api/charts/daily-near-miss?days=7');
                const data = await resp.json();

                const canvas = document.getElementById('near-miss-chart');
                const emptyMsg = document.getElementById('near-miss-chart-empty');

                if (data.count === 0) {
                    canvas.style.display = 'none';
                    emptyMsg.style.display = 'flex';
                    return;
                }

                canvas.style.display = 'block';
                emptyMsg.style.display = 'none';

                // Format dates for display (MM/DD)
                const labels = data.dates.map(d => {
                    const parts = d.split('-');
                    return `${parts[1]}/${parts[2]}`;
                });

                const chartData = {
                    labels: labels,
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Near-Miss',
                        data: data.counts,
                        backgroundColor: '#d29922',
                        borderRadius: 4,
                    }]
                };

                const config = {
                    type: 'bar',
                    data: chartData,
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: false,
                        plugins: {
                            legend: { display: false },
                            tooltip: {
                                backgroundColor: '#21262d',
                                borderColor: '#30363d',
                                borderWidth: 1,
                            }
                        },
                        scales: {
                            x: { grid: { display: false } },
                            y: {
                                beginAtZero: true,
                                grid: { color: 'rgba(48, 54, 61, 0.5)' },
                                ticks: { stepSize: 1 }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                };

                if (nearMissChart) {
                    nearMissChart.data = chartData;
                    nearMissChart.update('none');
                } else {
                    nearMissChart = new Chart(canvas, config);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Near-miss chart fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        async function fetchDailyChart() {
            try {
                const resp = await fetch('/api/charts/daily-executions?days=30');
                const data = await resp.json();

                const canvas = document.getElementById('daily-chart');
                const emptyMsg = document.getElementById('daily-chart-empty');

                if (data.count === 0) {
                    canvas.style.display = 'none';
                    emptyMsg.style.display = 'flex';
                    return;
                }

                canvas.style.display = 'block';
                emptyMsg.style.display = 'none';

                // Format dates for display (MM/DD)
                const labels = data.dates.map(d => {
                    const parts = d.split('-');
                    return `${parts[1]}/${parts[2]}`;
                });

                const chartData = {
                    labels: labels,
                    datasets: [
                        {
                            label: 'Filled',
                            data: data.filled,
                            backgroundColor: '#3fb950',
                            borderRadius: 4,
                        },
                        {
                            label: 'Partial',
                            data: data.partial,
                            backgroundColor: '#d29922',
                            borderRadius: 4,
                        },
                        {
                            label: 'Failed',
                            data: data.failed,
                            backgroundColor: '#f85149',
                            borderRadius: 4,
                        }
                    ]
                };

                const config = {
                    type: 'bar',
                    data: chartData,
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: false,
                        plugins: {
                            legend: {
                                position: 'top',
                                labels: {
                                    usePointStyle: true,
                                    padding: 20,
                                }
                            },
                            tooltip: {
                                backgroundColor: '#21262d',
                                borderColor: '#30363d',
                                borderWidth: 1,
                            }
                        },
                        scales: {
                            x: {
                                stacked: true,
                                grid: {
                                    display: false,
                                }
                            },
                            y: {
                                stacked: true,
                                grid: {
                                    color: 'rgba(48, 54, 61, 0.5)',
                                },
                                ticks: {
                                    stepSize: 1,
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    },
                };

                if (dailyChart) {
                    dailyChart.data = chartData;
                    dailyChart.update('none');
                } else {
                    dailyChart = new Chart(canvas, config);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Daily chart fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        async function fetchBalanceChart() {
            try {
                const resp = await fetch('/api/charts/daily-balance?days=30');
                const data = await resp.json();

                const canvas = document.getElementById('balance-chart');
                const emptyMsg = document.getElementById('balance-chart-empty');

                if (data.count === 0) {
                    canvas.style.display = 'none';
                    emptyMsg.style.display = 'flex';
                    return;
                }

                canvas.style.display = 'block';
                emptyMsg.style.display = 'none';

                // Format dates for display (MM/DD)
                const labels = data.dates.map(d => {
                    const parts = d.split('-');
                    return `${parts[1]}/${parts[2]}`;
                });

                const chartData = {
                    labels: labels,
                    datasets: [
                        {
                            label: 'Total (Est.)',
                            data: data.total,
                            borderColor: '#58a6ff',
                            backgroundColor: 'rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.1)',
                            fill: true,
                            tension: 0.3,
                            pointRadius: 3,
                            order: 1,
                        },
                        {
                            label: 'USDC (On-chain)',
                            data: data.usdc,
                            borderColor: '#3fb950',
                            backgroundColor: 'transparent',
                            borderDash: [5, 5],
                            tension: 0.3,
                            pointRadius: 2,
                            order: 2,
                        },
                        {
                            label: 'Positions (Est.)',
                            data: data.positions_value,
                            borderColor: '#a371f7',
                            backgroundColor: 'transparent',
                            borderDash: [5, 5],
                            tension: 0.3,
                            pointRadius: 2,
                            order: 3,
                        }
                    ]
                };

                const config = {
                    type: 'line',
                    data: chartData,
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: false,
                        interaction: {
                            mode: 'index',
                            intersect: false,
                        },
                        plugins: {
                            legend: {
                                position: 'top',
                                labels: {
                                    usePointStyle: true,
                                    padding: 20,
                                }
                            },
                            tooltip: {
                                backgroundColor: '#21262d',
                                borderColor: '#30363d',
                                borderWidth: 1,
                                callbacks: {
                                    label: function(context) {
                                        return `${context.dataset.label}: $${context.parsed.y.toFixed(2)}`;
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        },
                        scales: {
                            x: {
                                grid: { display: false }
                            },
                            y: {
                                grid: { color: 'rgba(48, 54, 61, 0.5)' },
                                ticks: {
                                    callback: (v) => '$' + v.toFixed(0)
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                };

                if (balanceChart) {
                    balanceChart.data = chartData;
                    balanceChart.update('none');
                } else {
                    balanceChart = new Chart(canvas, config);
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error('Balance chart fetch error:', e);
            }
        }

        // Initial load
        addLogLine('info', 'Dashboard initialized');
        fetchStatus();
        fetchBalance();
        fetchPnL();
        fetchAlerts();
        fetchNearMissAlerts();
        fetchTrades();
        fetchOrders();
        fetchPositions();
        fetchRedeemedHistory();
        fetchPriceUpdatesChart();
        fetchMarketsChart();
        fetchAlertsChart();
        fetchNearMissChart();
        fetchDailyChart();
        fetchBalanceChart();

        // Refresh intervals
        setInterval(fetchStatus, 5000);      // Status every 5s
        setInterval(fetchBalance, 30000);    // Balance every 30s
        setInterval(fetchPnL, 60000);        // PnL every 60s
        setInterval(() => fetchAlerts(false), 5000);      // Alerts every 5s
        setInterval(() => fetchNearMissAlerts(false), 10000);  // Near-miss every 10s
        setInterval(() => fetchTrades(false), 30000);     // Trades every 30s
        setInterval(fetchOrders, 2000);      // Orders every 2s (to catch pending fills)
        setInterval(fetchPositions, 30000);  // Positions every 30s
        setInterval(() => fetchRedeemedHistory(false), 60000);  // Redeemed history every 60s
        setInterval(fetchPriceUpdatesChart, 5000);  // Price updates every 5s (minute-level)
        setInterval(fetchMarketsChart, 60000);  // Markets chart every minute (hourly data)
        setInterval(fetchAlertsChart, 30000);  // Alerts chart every 30s
        setInterval(fetchNearMissChart, 30000);  // Near-miss chart every 30s
        setInterval(fetchDailyChart, 60000);  // Daily chart every minute
        setInterval(fetchBalanceChart, 60000);  // Balance chart every minute

        addLogLine('info', 'Live updates enabled');
    </script>
</body>
</html>


========== ./src/karb/scanner/__init__.py ==========
"""Market scanner module."""


========== ./src/karb/scanner/realtime_scanner.py ==========
"""Real-time market scanner using WebSocket streaming."""

import asyncio
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import Awaitable, Callable, Optional

from karb.api.gamma import GammaClient
from karb.api.models import Market
from karb.api.websocket import (
    OrderBookUpdate,
    PriceChange,
    WebSocketClient,
)
from karb.config import get_settings
from karb.data.database import init_async_db
from karb.data.repositories import AlertRepository, StatsRepository
from karb.notifications.slack import get_notifier
from karb.utils.logging import get_logger

log = get_logger(__name__)

# Maximum assets per WebSocket connection
MAX_ASSETS_PER_WS = 500
# Default number of WebSocket connections
DEFAULT_WS_CONNECTIONS = 6


@dataclass
class MarketPrices:
    """Tracks current prices for a market's YES and NO tokens."""
    market: Market
    yes_best_bid: Optional[Decimal] = None
    yes_best_ask: Optional[Decimal] = None
    no_best_bid: Optional[Decimal] = None
    no_best_ask: Optional[Decimal] = None
    # Size available at best ask prices
    yes_best_ask_size: Optional[Decimal] = None
    no_best_ask_size: Optional[Decimal] = None

    @property
    def combined_ask(self) -> Optional[Decimal]:
        """Cost to buy both YES and NO at best ask."""
        if self.yes_best_ask is None or self.no_best_ask is None:
            return None
        return self.yes_best_ask + self.no_best_ask

    @property
    def arbitrage_profit(self) -> Optional[Decimal]:
        """Potential profit from arbitrage (1 - combined_ask)."""
        combined = self.combined_ask
        if combined is None:
            return None
